violations.text: Establishment does not have an individual with the Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license. Application provided during time of inspection. Establishment to register an individual. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Composed salads were observed held at 44-45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were assessed and placed into other refrigeration to chill. Unit was observed at ranging ambient temperatures of 37-46 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit to be monitored, service to be called if unit cannot maintain temperature. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets for line prep unit and 2 door cooler in bakery area were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back of the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2025
The 2 door reach in freezer gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on multiple refrigerator doors. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
The coving by the back door in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2024
